name: CEE major-router revision
body:
Frozen Computers & Electrical Engineering round-two revision with a retrospectively audited support gate, 27-configuration gate sensitivity, fitted-pair utility dispersion, explicit fallback hierarchy, all-row and two-stage analytical controls, severity/group/mechanism/batch transport, exact environments, prediction-level source data, editable figures, and manuscript sources.

Computational snapshot: 59be82fc18aaf48b819c3c71a9482425f8baac45
Software DOI: not assigned.
